cards.back: An entity that issues and verifies digital certificates, ensuring the public key belongs to the claimed identity
The process of obtaining, using, and revoking a digital certificate, which includes issuance, deployment, use, and revocation
A framework used to manage public keys, including key generation, distribution, storage, and revocation, to maintain confidentiality and integrity
A public-key management model that centralizes the management of public keys, including key generation, distribution, and revocation, using a trusted third-party entity
A digital certificate that contains a public key, identity information, and other attributes, using the X.509 standard for secure communication and authentication
